name: rpi4-sensevoice
description: Raspberry Pi 4 (CPU-only): SenseVoice offline ASR (zh/en/ja/ko/yue) via sherpa-onnx OfflineRecognizer.from_sense_voice. SenseVoice serves the offline /asr path; streaming Paraformer also loads for /asr/stream. 'exclusive' policy so ASR and TTS can't both pin all four cores at once.
